# Twitter/X Launch Thread

## Tweet 1 (Main)

🌍 I built E-GEO to optimize content for AI search engines.

One command:

```bash
/geo https://yoursite.com
```

It runs 4 AI agents that analyze → rank → rewrite → generate schema for ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini.

Based on published research (arXiv:2511.20867)

Open source, MIT licensed.

GitHub below 👇

## Tweet 2 (Problem)

Traditional SEO optimizes for Google.

But what about ChatGPT? Perplexity? Claude?

AI engines don't use backlinks or keywords—they use content features.

E-GEO optimizes for how LLMs understand and recommend content.

## Tweet 3 (Research)

E-GEO is based on research identifying 10 universal GEO features:

• Ranking Emphasis (+0.71 rank improvement)
• User Intent Alignment
• Competitive Differentiation
• Social Proof
• +6 more features

Link: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.20867

## Tweet 4 (How It Works)

The 4 agents:

1️⃣ Analyzer - Extracts content, scores GEO signals
2️⃣ Ranker - Simulates AI-engine ranking
3️⃣ Rewriter - Optimizes (preserves brand voice)
4️⃣ Indexer - Generates schema markup

All orchestrated by Claude Code.

## Tweet 5 (Results)

Average results from the research:

✅ +25 point score improvement (45 → 70)
✅ Estimated +2-3 ranking positions
✅ 3x faster than manual

Individual results vary.

## Tweet 6 (Example)

Before:

"Our pricing is competitive."

After (E-GEO optimized):

"Most teams choose our pricing over competitors because [specific reason]. 500+ companies have switched this year."

Same facts. Optimized for AI engines.

## Launch Tips

- **Time:** Tuesday-Wednesday, 9am-12pm PT
- **Engage:** Reply to comments within 30 minutes
- **Visuals:** Consider adding a screenshot of the output
- **Hashtags:** #GEO #AISearch #ChatGPT #SEO #OpenSource

## Image Suggestion

Create a screenshot showing:
- Original content
- GEO score (45/100)
- Optimized content
- New GEO score (78/100)
- Visual progress bars
